subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-02-10
subcodes.first_line: This world is like unto a vast theatrical stage. The audience is composed of the whole human race. The range and variety of the plays acted upon this stage are as numerous
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @effort; striving
